feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to restrict accounting document types for specific users?
entry.content:
I need to restrict posting document type 'SA' for example, so that only specific users can post same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Logic for the fields in Custome CDS (S4 Public Cloud)
entry.content:
We had a requirement with building a report for the PR Report, so a custom CDS was created, and the Custom Analytical Queries app is being used for reporting and analysis. The primary data source used is I_PurchaseRequisitionItemAPI01 CDS, with multiple associated CDS used as primary data sources.


The data is directly fetched from the database and displayed, but there is no option to incorporate custom logic for a field within the custom CDS itself. Could you help us with a solution to add the required logic for the fields in the Custom CDS?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Maintain restrictions in business role
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

May I get your kind input?

I created a Business Role regarding Business Partners. The goal is to be able to see only Business Partners with the role "customer". The created Role has the following restrictions:

1) Restricted permission to write, read and value help in the access categories 

2) The following Business Catalogs

 

3) In the restrictions itself I maintained the BP-Role restriction to be able to see and manage BP only with the role "customer" (the other restrictions I put on "unrestricted")

In the tests I assigned only this role to me and if I open the "manage business partner" App I see all of the partners. So, the restriction doesn't work.

Does anyone know how this problem could be fixed?

entry.title: Payment batch status is not getting updated
entry.content:
Payment batch status is not getting updated. It always shows status as "Payment Medium Created"


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: EDI Error
entry.content:
We could see multiple KOFL invoices in the EDI system for the same invoice number we are expecting only the ZED2 invoice.

Need to know why both ZED2 and ZEDI invoices are being sent for KOFL and how we have crossed check the NACE transaction unable to find any details.

entry.title: Import tab not available in ME21N Create purchase order advanced app to enter import related details
entry.content:
Import tab not available in ME21N Create purchase order advanced app to enter import related details like country of origin.

Document type - NB . Enter overseas supplier, enter material, qty, price, delivery date, plant, storage location. import tab is not available in item details. does this require a specific GSI To activate/ configuration in CBC?

entry.title: QTD functionality on Group Financial Statements Review Booklet app
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to create a report in group reporting, in the review booklet app. More specifically the Group Financial Statements in Group Reporting Public Cloud edition.

I am having issues when displaying the data by quarter to date.

The report offers various fields in the Available Objects - Structure section and I was able to find the field "Closing Quarter P/YYYY". However, this field retrieves the data for the entire quarter instead of from the first period of the quarter to the period selected in the report filters.

Example, if my Quarter 1 goes from Jan to March and I want my report to retrieve February data, my expectation of the QTD is to retrieve January + February data. However, the field "Closing Quarter P/YYYY" in the Group Financial Statements Review Booklet app pulls January + February + March. 

How can I obtain the field QTD-Quarter to date where the field retrieves the aggregated value of the first period of the quarter to the actual reporting period?

I have also tried creating the field using the "Add Calculation" functions, but I couldn't make it work due to the lack of necessary fields.

Is there another report in Group Reporting where the field QTD-Quarter to date (or Closing quarter to date) could be available?

Thank you.

entry.title: Assign Inspection Lot Origins to a custom Inspection Type in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
I've created a custom inspection type (Z2) which should replicate the standard inspection type 02 of the SAP On-Premise system. 

 

I enter the Implementation Activities node "Maintain Inspection Lot Origins and Assign Inspection Types", when I click on Edit button, I have no possibility to add a new entry. My purpose is add an entry that refers to the inspection lot origin 02 (Goods Issue) and link it to my own custom inspection type 02. 

 

Can you please activate the possibility to enter new entries? Or, can you please add a new entry for me? 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: When processing a payment request, I am prompted that the payment request is not set as the supplier
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance；#1.After the payment application of accounts payable is approved, when making payment, you will be prompted that the payment request is not set as the supplier's special GL ID. What should I do?； 2.When processing a payment request, I am prompted that the payment request is not set as the supplier's special GL ID. What should I do?

entry.title: FG costing for projects with revenue - S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, everyone,

I'm using projects with production.

I would like to know if it is possible to use the project costs to perform the costing of the finished product?

I have a sales order with the FG and is linked to the WBS at item level.

The production order is generated by the project requirements as described in scope item 6DG.

At the moment the system is only using the costs of the production order to determine the costing of the FG.

In this case it is a make-to-order product where there are many variations that cannot be taken into account in the production order. These variations are then allocated to the project, leading to costs that must be taken into account in the costing of the FG.

How should I proceed?

Thank you,

Best regards,

Rafael

entry.title: In SAP Public Cloud I want to create a custom CDS but I cannot aggregate values
entry.content:
In SAP Public Cloud I've created a Custom Standard CDS where I only have 4 fields:
Purchase Order, Purchase Order Item, Quantity Unit and Quantity. In the Elements Properties tab, I have defined the quantity field as an aggregation by Sum. 

When I do Data Browser to check the data, the quantity is not aggregated (The Unit is the same for all PO that I am checking). I am assuming that the Group By is automatically set to all the available fields in the CDS.
What am I missing?

Thanks

entry.title: Unable to create Bank Master data in Test environment in Public Cloud
entry.content:
We are performing SIT in the test environment and attempting to import bank accounts from the Dev system.

However, we are encountering an error while creating bank accounts, which states: "You are not authorized to create new bank accounts." As a result, we are unable to import the master data and bank accounts.

We have made sure that Cash manager role has following catalog items attached. (SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAM2_BASIC_PC , SAP_FIN_BC_CM_MEMO_IMPORT_PC ,SAP_FIN_BC_CM_MEMO_MANAGE_PC )

entry.title: Is there a way to detect MRP failure? Also, is there a way to intentionally make it fail?
entry.content:
Hi

How can the person in charge recognize MRP failures?

 

A “failed” status exists in Schedule MRP Runs App.

Is there a way to detect MRP failure?

also…

is there a way to intentionally make it fail?

 

Please tell me

entry.title: Where is " Create Technical Object" App in SAp S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi 

this picture is " 5CP "  (step 4 Proceures)

I want Create Equipment PRT.

but There is no "Create Technical Object" App in SAP S/4HANA Public Edition…

Where?? please tell me.

Roles is perfect

entry.title: Two fields using WITH_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION always using one of the field as basis in navigation
entry.content:
I've developed a fiori app using cds annotation. It has two fields which are accounting document and a reclass accounting document.

I've added an WITH_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION on both fields. When I click on the accounting document value it goes to the manage journal entries as expected but when I click on the reclass accounting document, in goes into manage journal entries but the value its taking is the accounting document column and not the reclass.

How can I make the navigation know which field to take to be used when navigating to another app?

entry.title: Diffrence in APi versions of S4 HANA public cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

we are exploring the public cloud APIs.

 

Can you pls let me know the difference between 
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition for ABAP Platform

Vs

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Get BP contact address details with API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
entry.content:
BP DIGITS has contact PHONE_NUMBER with an address with all the details (e-mail, fax, telephone, mobile phone; see attached document). We cannot find a way to retrieve these details with REST API API_BUSINESS_PARTNER.


 


We are calling GET /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BPContactToAddress?$filter=BusinessPartnerCompany eq 'DIGITS'&$expand=to_EmailAddress,to_FaxNumber,to_MobilePhoneNumber,to_PhoneNumber


But in the response we just receive empty arrays:


"to_EmailAddress": {
                    "results": []
                },
                "to_FaxNumber": {
                    "results": []
                },
                "to_MobilePhoneNumber": {
                    "results": []
                },
                "to_PhoneNumber": {
                    "results": []
                },


Can you instruct us what is the right way to retrieve the data?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: I want to batch update bank groups in the bank master.
entry.content:
I want to update the bank group in the bank master.
To update the registered bank master information in a batch, I think I will use "Import Bank Directories (BIC2S)".

In the application, I can choose the file template to upload, such as SWIFT or JBA.
I don't see the bank group in the template item, so I'm wondering if I can't update it.
I checked the Help Portal and it said I could update the bank group, but I didn't know what to do.
Could you give me some advice?
If you have any examples of how this works, I would appreciate it if you could comment.

entry.title: Guidance Needed on Exchange Rate Automation for S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
I hope this message finds you well. We are currently evaluating options for automating exchange rate updates in our S/4HANA Cloud environment and would appreciate your guidance on the following:

 

1. For SAP Market Rates Management:

 

• How does the Refinitiv option work in S/4HANA Cloud? Is the integration fully automatic, or are there manual steps involved?

 

• What are the associated costs (e.g., subscription fees)?

 

• Are there any additional setup or configuration requirements?

 

2. For the Bring-Your-Own-Rates (BYOR) option:

 

• What are the prerequisites for connecting a third-party API (e.g., OANDA) to S/4HANA Cloud?

 

• Are there specific tools or configurations needed to build this integration?

 

3. Are there any free or cost-effective APIs you recommend that can provide exchange rate data and integrate with S/4HANA Cloud?

 

Your assistance in understanding these options would be greatly appreciated, as it will help us determine the most efficient approach for our requirements.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to get the XML file for quality certificate form template in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
Cannot find XML file for Quality Certificate form (QM_QUALITY_CERTIFICATE_FORM) in App: Manage Inspection Lots (Application Object: INSPECTION_LOT).
How can I get this in public cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
